basic_details.short_information: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 offers 79 vacancies for Graduate, Diploma Apprentice posts. Eligible candidates with Any Graduate, B.Lib, PG Diploma, M.Lib can apply online from 01-06-2026 to 12-06-2026 through the official NIT Calicut website, nitc.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: Apprenticeship Training only - No claim for regular employment after training

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Lib, PG Diploma, M.Lib

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online application process only:
seo_tags: NIT Calicut Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 79 Graduate, Diploma Apprentice Posts
